Initial release of DuoStats watchface for Pebble 2.

### Install
Download duostats.pbw below and open it with the Pebble / Rebble app on your phone.

### What is included
- Compiled binaries for all 5 Pebble platforms (diorite/Pebble 2, basalt, chalk, emery, aplite)
- Time display in top 1/3, four configurable health data boxes in bottom 2/3
- Dark and light mode
- Configurable box data sources: Steps, Distance, Calories, Sleep
